GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_CONSTRUCT_POWER.title: Ancient Construct
GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_CONSTRUCT_POWER.descrip: Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold] at the start of your turn if you have no [gold]Artifact[/gold].
GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_CONSTRUCT_POWER.smartDe: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold] at the start of your turn if you have no [gold]Artifact[/gold].
GUARDIAN-BRACING_POWER.title: Bracing
GUARDIAN-BRACING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Brace[/gold].
GUARDIAN-BRACING_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, [gold]Brace[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
GUARDIAN-CONSTRUCTION_FORM_POWER.title: Construction Form
GUARDIAN-CONSTRUCTION_FORM_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, if you have at [gold]Buffer[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
GUARDIAN-CONSTRUCTION_FORM_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your turn, if you have [gold]Buffer[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
GUARDIAN-DEFENSIVE_MODE_POWER.title: Defensive Mode
GUARDIAN-DEFENSIVE_MODE_POWER.descriptio:
You have [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] and your [gold]Block[/gold] does not expire.
You will exit [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold] at the end of this combat round.
GUARDIAN-DEFENSIVE_MODE_POWER.smartDescr:
You have {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] and your [gold]Block[/gold] does not expire.
{Amount:plural:You will exit [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold] at the end of this combat round.|[gold]Defensive Mode[/gold] will be active for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more rounds.}
GUARDIAN-EVASIVE_PROTOCOL_POWER.title: Evasive Protocol
GUARDIAN-EXHAUST_STATUSES_POWER.title: Repulse
GUARDIAN-EXHAUST_STATUSES_POWER.descript: When you draw the first Status or Curse cards each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them and draw a card.
GUARDIAN-EXHAUST_STATUSES_POWER.smartDes: When you draw the first {Amount:plural:|{Amount} }Status or Curse {Amount:plural:card|cards} each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Amount:plural:it|them} and draw a card.
GUARDIAN-FLOATING_ORBS_POWER.title: Floating Orbs
GUARDIAN-FLOATING_ORBS_POWER.description: Whenever you play a 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card, deal damage to a random enemy.
GUARDIAN-FLOATING_ORBS_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you play a 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
GUARDIAN-FUTURE_PLANS_POWER.title: Future Plans
GUARDIAN-FUTURE_PLANS_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, you may place [blue]1[/blue] card into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-FUTURE_PLANS_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of your turn, you may place {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-GEM_FINDER_POWER.title: Gem Finder
GUARDIAN-GEM_FINDER_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card with a [gold]Gem[/gold] in it, [gold]Brace[/gold].
GUARDIAN-GEM_FINDER_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever you play a card with a [gold]Gem[/gold] in it, [gold]Brace[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
GUARDIAN-MODE_SHIFT_POWER.title: Mode Shift
GUARDIAN-MODE_SHIFT_POWER.description: When you lose HP gain [blue]16[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold] until next turn, and increase this amount requiored to trigger this effect again by [blue]10[/blue], up to a maximum of [blue]50[/blue].
GUARDIAN-MODE_SHIFT_POWER.smartDescripti: When you lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold] until next turn, and increase this amount required to trigger this effect again by [blue]{Increase:diff()}[/blue], up to a maximum of [blue]{MaxLimit:diff()}[/blue].
GUARDIAN-REROUTE_POWER.title: Reroute
GUARDIAN-REROUTE_POWER.description: Place the next not [gold]Exhausting[/gold] Attack or Skill you play this turn into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-REROUTE_POWER.smartDescription: Place the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] not [gold]Exhausting[/gold] {Amount:plural:Attack or Skill|Attacks or Skills} you play this turn into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-REVENGE_PROTOCOL_POWER.title: Revenge Protocol
GUARDIAN-SPIKER_PROTOCOL_POWER.title: Spiker Protocol
GUARDIAN-STASIS_ENGINE_POWER.title: Stasis Engine
GUARDIAN-STASIS_ENGINE_POWER.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw [blue]1[/blue] card whenever you play the [blue]3rd[/blue] 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card in a single turn.
GUARDIAN-STASIS_ENGINE_POWER.smartDescri: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} whenever you play the [blue]3rd[/blue] 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card in a single turn.
GUARDIAN-TIME_SIFTER_POWER.title: Time Sifter
GUARDIAN-TIME_SIFTER_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Accelerate[/gold].
GUARDIAN-TIME_SIFTER_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of your turn, [gold]Accelerate[/gold] {Amount:plural:| [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times}.
GUARDIAN-SHARP_HIDE_POWER.title: Sharp Hide
GUARDIAN-SHARP_HIDE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-SHARP_HIDE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_REFRACTION_POWER.title: Temporal Refraction
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_REFRACTION_POWER.descr: Double the [gold]Gem[/gold] effect you activate each turn.
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_REFRACTION_POWER.smart: Double the first {Amount:plural:[gold]Gem[/gold] effect|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gem[/gold] effects} you activate each turn.
GUARDIAN-BRILLIANT_SCALES_POWER.title: Brilliant Scales
GUARDIAN-BRILLIANT_SCALES_POWER.descript: At the start of every turn, play [gold]Gems[/gold] of this.
GUARDIAN-BRILLIANT_SCALES_POWER.smartDes:
At the start of every turn,
{effects}
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_BRAMBLES_POWER.title: Bronze Brambles
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_BRAMBLES_POWER.descripti: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain [gold]Thorns[/gold].
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_BRAMBLES_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you are debuffed, also gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
GUARDIAN-MAXIMUM_OVERDRIVE_POWER.title: Maximum Overdrive
GUARDIAN-MAXIMUM_OVERDRIVE_POWER.descrip: Whenever a card ticks down in [gold]Stasis[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-MAXIMUM_OVERDRIVE_POWER.smartDe: Whenever a card ticks down in [gold]Stasis[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK_BLOCK_POWER.title: Overblock
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK_BLOCK_POWER.descripti: Whenever you enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold], the ally with the least [gold]Block[/gold] gains [gold]Block[/gold].
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK_THORNS_POWER.title: Overblock
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK_THORNS_POWER.descript: Whenever you enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold], the ally with the least [gold]Block[/gold] gains [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK_THORNS_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold], the ally with the least [gold]Block[/gold] gains[blue] {Amount}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK_BLOCK_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold], the ally with the least [gold]Block[/gold] gains[blue] {Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
